channel.title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
channel.description: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Creamy Banana Pudding Dessert
item.description: Enjoy a smooth and creamy banana pudding with simple ingredients. A classic dessert that’s easy to make and perfect for sharing.

media:content.media:title: Creamy Banana Pudding Dessert
media:content.media:description: Enjoy a smooth and creamy banana pudding with simple ingredients. A classic dessert that’s easy to make and perfect for sharing.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Crispy Buttermilk Fried Chicken
item.description: Learn how to make crispy, golden fried chicken with a buttermilk marinade. A classic recipe that delivers juicy texture and rich flavor.

media:content.media:title: Crispy Buttermilk Fried Chicken
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make crispy, golden fried chicken with a buttermilk marinade. A classic recipe that delivers juicy texture and rich flavor.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: A Common Pork Cooking Mistake
item.description: Learn a key tip to cook pork more evenly and keep it tender. A simple adjustment that can improve flavor and texture every time.

media:content.media:title: A Common Pork Cooking Mistake
media:content.media:description: Learn a key tip to cook pork more evenly and keep it tender. A simple adjustment that can improve flavor and texture every time.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Creamed Corn in Under a Minute
item.description: Make smooth, creamy corn in under a minute with a quick, easy method. A fast side dish that pairs well with any home-cooked meal.

media:content.media:title: Creamed Corn in Under a Minute
media:content.media:description: Make smooth, creamy corn in under a minute with a quick, easy method. A fast side dish that pairs well with any home-cooked meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: A Simple Trick for Perfect Gravy
item.description: Learn an easy method to thicken gravy smoothly and enhance its texture. A helpful tip for making rich, comforting meals at home.

media:content.media:title: A Simple Trick for Perfect Gravy
media:content.media:description: Learn an easy method to thicken gravy smoothly and enhance its texture. A helpful tip for making rich, comforting meals at home.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: A Smart Trick to Reduce Sodium
item.description: Discover a simple way to enhance flavor while using less salt. A helpful tip for more balanced, heart-conscious home cooking.

media:content.media:title: A Smart Trick to Reduce Sodium
media:content.media:description: Discover a simple way to enhance flavor while using less salt. A helpful tip for more balanced, heart-conscious home cooking.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: A Simple Marinade for Juicy Chicken
item.description: Learn a balanced marinade that helps keep chicken tender and flavorful. Easy to prepare and perfect for grilling, baking, or pan-cooking.

media:content.media:title: A Simple Marinade for Juicy Chicken
media:content.media:description: Learn a balanced marinade that helps keep chicken tender and flavorful. Easy to prepare and perfect for grilling, baking, or pan-cooking.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: A Simple Potato Trick to Try
item.description: Learn an easy potato technique that can improve texture and flavor. A practical tip to make everyday cooking more enjoyable.

media:content.media:title: A Simple Potato Trick to Try
media:content.media:description: Learn an easy potato technique that can improve texture and flavor. A practical tip to make everyday cooking more enjoyable.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Flavor-Packed Rice Made Easy
item.description: Turn simple rice into a rich, aromatic dish with easy ingredients and techniques. A great side or base for your favorite meals.

media:content.media:title: Flavor-Packed Rice Made Easy
media:content.media:description: Turn simple rice into a rich, aromatic dish with easy ingredients and techniques. A great side or base for your favorite meals.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
